title: Gurugram's Property Market in 2026: Where the Next Corridor Is Forming
excerpt: The Dwarka Expressway and the metro extension are quietly redrawing the map. Here is where prices have already moved — and the three pockets we think are still underpriced.
author: Anand Mehta

title: The Home Loan Checklist Every First-Time Buyer Gets Wrong
excerpt: Your EMI is not your cost of ownership. A practical walkthrough of the seven numbers to compute before you sign — and the two that lenders would rather you not ask about.
author: Priya Nair

title: RERA: What It Actually Protects You From (And What It Doesn't)
excerpt: Most buyers treat the RERA number as a rubber stamp. It is a legal instrument with real teeth — if you know which three clauses to read before booking.
author: Anand Mehta
